function apiurl(speakText, speakSpeed, apiurl) {
    let info = this.source.getLoginInfoMap();
    let api = apiurl || info["api"];
    let apik = apiM[api];
    let fyr = info["发言人"];
    let fyrk = fyrM[fyr];
    let fg = info["风格"];
    let fgk = styleM[fg];
    let body = {};
    let params = `?t=${speakText}&v=${fyrk}&r=${(speakSpeed - 10) * 10}&p=0&s=${fgk}&api_key=`;
    return `${api}${params}`;
}
name: 🌈Next引擎-长按切换音色
